sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105032" key="tri/makros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐ´-μακρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, in metre, <sense id="n105032.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of three long syllables,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Heph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.217</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
